pattern: Greedy suffix-flip: each flip from index i inverts everything to the right, so greedily flip whenever the current element (accounting for parity) is 0, counting transitions.
hints: Each operation picks an index i and flips the entire suffix [i..n-1]. Count the number of 0-to-1 and 1-to-0 transitions while scanning — each transition requires one flip.
Equivalently, count the number of positions where nums[i] != (target after all previous flips). A running parity tracker removes the need to actually mutate the array.
The minimum number of flips equals the number of 0s encountered in the array after processing left-to-right with the parity toggle: every time you must flip, increment and toggle.

edge_inputs.description: one block of zeros then ones: 1 flip

stress.description: random binary arrays length up to 1000
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = rng.randint(1, size)
    nums = [rng.randint(0, 1) for _ in range(n)]
    return [nums]
